get.summary: List AppBackends in the specified workspace.
get.description:
> [!NOTE]
> The AppBackend item is currently in preview ([learn more](/fabric/fundamentals/preview)).

Lists AppBackends in the specified workspace.

This API supports [pagination](/rest/api/fabric/articles/pagination).

## Permissions

 The caller must have a *viewer* workspace role. 

## Required Delegated Scopes

 Workspace.Read.All or Workspace.ReadWrite.All

## Microsoft Entra supported identities

This API supports the Microsoft [identities](/rest/api/fabric/articles/identity-support) listed in this section.

| Identity | Support |
|-|-|
| User | Yes |
| [Service principal](/entra/identity-platform/app-objects-and-service-principals#service-principal-object) and [Managed identities](/entra/identity/managed-identities-azure-resources/overview) | Yes |

## Interface

parameters.name: recursive
parameters.description: Indicates whether to list items recursively. If `true`, lists items in the folder and all nested folders. If `false`, lists only the items directly within the folder. Default is `true`.

parameters.name: rootFolderId
parameters.description: This parameter allows users to filter items based on a specific root folder. If not provided, the workspace is used as the root folder.

parameters.name: continuationToken
parameters.description: A token for retrieving the next page of results.

429.description: The service rate limit was exceeded. The server returns a `Retry-After` header indicating, in seconds, how long the client must wait before sending additional requests.

Retry-After.description: The number of seconds to wait before retrying the request.

default.description:
Common error codes:

* InvalidItemType - Invalid item type.

post.summary: Create an AppBackend in the specified workspace.
post.description:
> [!NOTE]
> The AppBackend item is currently in preview ([learn more](/fabric/fundamentals/preview)).

Creates an AppBackend in the specified workspace.

This API supports [long running operations (LRO)](/rest/api/fabric/articles/long-running-operation).

 ## Permissions 
 The caller must have a *contributor* workspace role. 

## Required Delegated Scopes

 Item.ReadWrite.All

## Limitations
- To create an AppBackend, the workspace must be on a supported Fabric capacity. For more information, see: [Microsoft Fabric license types](/fabric/enterprise/licenses#microsoft-fabric-license-types).

## Microsoft Entra supported identities

This API supports the Microsoft [identities](/rest/api/fabric/articles/identity-support) listed in this section.

| Identity | Support |
|-|-|
| User | Yes |
| [Service principal](/entra/identity-platform/app-objects-and-service-principals#service-principal-object) and [Managed identities](/entra/identity/managed-identities-azure-resources/overview) | Yes |

## Interface

202.description: Request accepted, AppBackend provisioning in progress.

Location.description: The URL of the operation status, which can be used to track the operation state.

x-ms-operation-id.description: The operation ID which can be used with long running operations (LRO) APIs to track the operation state and get the result.

Retry-After.description: The number of seconds to wait before retrying the request.

429.description: The service rate limit was exceeded. The server returns a `Retry-After` header indicating, in seconds, how long the client must wait before sending additional requests.

Retry-After.description: The number of seconds to wait before retrying the request.

default.description:
Common error codes:

* InvalidItemType - Item type is invalid.

* ItemDisplayNameAlreadyInUse - Item display name is already used.

* CorruptedPayload - The provided payload is corrupted.

* WorkspaceItemsLimitExceeded - Workspace item limit exceeded.

get.description:
> [!NOTE]
> The AppBackend item is currently in preview ([learn more](/fabric/fundamentals/preview)).

Returns properties of the specified AppBackend.

## Permissions

 The caller must have *read* permissions for the AppBackend. 

## Required Delegated Scopes

 Item.Read.All or Item.ReadWrite.All

## Microsoft Entra supported identities

This API supports the Microsoft [identities](/rest/api/fabric/articles/identity-support) listed in this section.

| Identity | Support |
|-|-|
| User | Yes |
| [Service principal](/entra/identity-platform/app-objects-and-service-principals#service-principal-object) and [Managed identities](/entra/identity/managed-identities-azure-resources/overview) | Yes |

## Interface

429.description: The service rate limit was exceeded. The server returns a `Retry-After` header indicating, in seconds, how long the client must wait before sending additional requests.

Retry-After.description: The number of seconds to wait before retrying the request.

default.description:
Common error codes:

* ItemNotFound - The requested item was not found.

patch.description:
> [!NOTE]
> The AppBackend item is currently in preview ([learn more](/fabric/fundamentals/preview)).

Updates the properties of the specified AppBackend.

## Permissions

 The caller must have *read and write* permissions for the AppBackend.

## Required Delegated Scopes

 Item.ReadWrite.All

## Interface

* InvalidRequest - Invalid update request.
